ai_summary: Here is the executive summary based on the provided document text:  The most significant finding is that India Power Corporation Limited (formerly DPSC Limited) has been admitted into a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) by the NCLT as of May 15, 2026, marking a severe red flag and signifying profound financial distress. This materially impacts the company's operations and poses a high risk of capital loss for investors. The document also includes unrelated financial statements for EITA India Limited showing year-on-year profit growth, and an AGM notice for Gretex Industries Limited, which are separate entities.
